sections.paragraph:
f. ( Isa 21:2) Media, Gen 10:2 Est 1:3 2Ki 17:6 18:11 Jer 25:25 51:11 , 28 Jer 51:28, and the Medes, Isa 13:17 21:2 Dan 9:1. (syr. ܡܰܕܰܝ id.) Gent. noun מָדִי a Mede, Dan 11:1. [Various conjectures have been advanced as to the etymology: some of these lead to the signification of midst, middle.]

מדי

Ch. id. Media, Ezr 6:2 Dan 5:28 6:13 . Gentile noun emphat. מָדָאָה, מָדָיָא כתיב a Mede, Dan 6:1.
